subject: Move master back to ee85d1d1cef081ba91c40c046fe03728aad23c5d
commit_message:
Move master back to ee85d1d1cef081ba91c40c046fe03728aad23c5d

Created just to test on the gating if we are able to get a successful
run on master branch from that date.

Issue-ID: OOM-1
Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Opasiak <k.opasiak@samsung.com>
Change-Id: I63a44164a7178dd60c40404e1a4a1525e2620c61

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/967/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/967/ )

Patch Set 1:

E2E tests and policy are not related
Enhanced policy used to be failed because policy tem merged the modificaiton of the test before it was merged in OOM
so we got a 202 instead of a 200
it was recently fixed

here for the E2E we have 2 types of errors
- SDC (basic_vm) 500 from SDC
- SDNC (basic_network, basic_cnf)
